subcodes.first_line: O My brother and My beloved! God willing, mayst thou ever soar in the sanctified atmosphere of nearness unto the All-Glorious, and in the sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اخی و حبیبی انشاء الله لازال در هوای قرب قدس ذوالجلال طیار باشید و در بحر
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis
